claim_bullets.bullet_text: Spirit Wall: Wisp creates a 50 cm hole; effects negate if used with another wall (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.92-95)
Spirit Wall: Sylph creates a storm wall; deflects projectiles and is immune to damage (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.92-95)
Spirit Wall: Dryad creates a vegetation wall; blocks passage and regenerates (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.92-95)

source_record_text: Summary of the Spirit Magic List section from Sword World RPG - Complete Edition, pages 92-95.
